name: find-the-photos
description: A photo-based family treasure hunt game (web first).

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @ftp/shared && npm run build --workspace @ftp/server && npm run build --workspace @ftp/web
scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace @ftp/shared && concurrently -n server,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev --workspace @ftp/server" "npm run dev --workspace @ftp/web"
